title: Brunel Building
notes:
Clean and Disinfect CWST'S

To attend site and carry out a clean and disinfection of the Lower Basement drinking water CWST's 1 & 2. 

To drain, clean and disinfect cold water storage tank(s) only, inside
normal hours, to L8, HSG274 and BS8558, including condition
report.
Works will include post cleaning contact spray disinfection of the
tank internals using BPR registered Silver Hydrogen Peroxide for 1
hour. Tank to be refilled with fresh water, checked for residual
Hydrogen Peroxide, and returned to service.

title: The Smithsons - (KCE) - SA
notes:
Closed Systems Remedial Dosing via fitted dosing pots

To dose the LTHW, CHW and Condense systems with corrosion inhibitor and mono-ethylene glycol

3 x M27

12 x WTP MEG 


VISIT 1-Dosing
- LTHW - 10 litres WTP M27
- CHW - 20 litres WTP M27
- Condense - 300 litres WTP MEG 



VISIT 2- post dose sampling
- LTHW - 1 x CHEM POST DOSE
- CHW - 1 x CHEM POST DOSE
- Condense 1 x CHEM POST DOSE + GLYCOL
(Suite = CHEM BASIC+GLYCOL, 1L Sample required)
(Suite=CHEM POST DOSE, 1L Sample required)
